full_text:
Guo Ma 郭馬
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Ma (郭馬). Originally an officer of Wu, Guo Ma revolted in Nanhai. Eventually defeated by Tao Huang. Guo Ma was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
